requested_items.objective: Run bounded synth-only nm2 npu_top ablations to identify the feature that causes whole-top synthesis to become nonviable.

expected_result.reason: The output should identify the first top-level feature delta that changes nm2 whole-top synth from viable to nonviable, or show that a broader interaction matrix is required.
